item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump orders US Navy to destroy boats laying mines in Hormuz strait
- Trump orders Navy to shoot any boat laying mines in Strait of Hormuz amid ceasefire
- Trump says US Navy will ‘shoot and kill’ any boat laying mines in strait
- Trump Orders U.S. Navy to 'Shoot and Kill' Any Boat Laying Mines in Strait of Hormuz
- Urgent: Trump orders U.S. forces to strike on boats putting mines in Hormuz
- Flash: U.S. Navy to shoot any boat putting mines in Hormuz Strait, mine sweepers are clearing the Strait -- Trump
- Trump orders US Navy to 'shoot and kill' any boats laying mines in Strait of Hormuz
- Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill' any boat laying mines in Strait of Hormuz]]>
